title: BioNEST-ICIITP
tagline: Dedicated Biotech, MedTech, and Life Sciences incubation wing at IC IITP.
funder: Biotechnology Industry Research Assistance Council (BIRAC), Dept. of Biotechnology (DBT)
focusAreas: Materials for Medical and Other Applications
eligibility: Startups and companies in Biotech, MedTech, Life Sciences, or related areas
Must demonstrate a technology-led innovation with a healthcare or life sciences application
Startup from idea stage to early scaling are welcome
support: Mentorship on entity registration, problem validation, product and service definition, patents, and other aspects of business planning
Product development support including design and prototyping
Product testing support — facilities for testing of devices and other products, including market trials
Clinical studies support — access to partner networks for clinical validation of life sciences products
facilities: Air-conditioned co-working incubation office space with cubicles, furniture, and internet connectivity
8-seater meeting rooms with audio-visual setup, computers, and AC

process.title: Download & Submit Application
process.description: Applications can be submitted through the BioNEST Call-2 application form available for download.

process.title: Domain Expert Review
process.description: Received applications will be scrutinised by domain experts.

process.title: Pitch to Selection Committee
process.description: Shortlisted applicants will be called to pitch their idea or technology to the selection committee.

process.title: Offer of Incubation
process.description: Offer of incubation or support will be sent to selected startups, stating the terms of support.

process.title: Sign Agreement
process.description: An agreement is signed between the startup and IC IIT Patna subsequent to acceptance of the offer.

process.title: Onboarding
process.description: Startup is onboarded and support activities are initiated as soon as the agreement is signed.

notes: Startups supported under ICIITP BioNEST will be assisted in applying for various grant schemes of BIRAC and DBT.
IC IITP BioNEST conducts periodic investor interaction meets where companies can pitch for private investment.
Startups can avail funding under various schemes operating at IC IIT Patna, subject to eligibility and selection criteria of those schemes.
about: BioNEST-ICIITP is a 10,000 sq ft dedicated Biotech and MedTech incubation wing at IC IITP, established under the BIRAC BioNEST scheme. The wing supports startups working at the intersection of biology, medicine, electronics, and data — from bio-signal processing and medical imaging to biomarker diagnostics and novel medical materials. Incubatees gain access to state-of-the-art labs, BIRAC/DBT grant linkages, and the broader IC IITP ecosystem. Call for Proposals 2 is currently active.
